title: Spesh 50 Pcs Cupcake Cases Disposable Muffin Liners Foil Cupcake Cups Oil Proof Baking Cups for Birthday,Wedding,Christmas(White-Gold)
features: High-quality Material: The muffin cups are made from food grade paper, which makes them safe, waterproof and oil proof. They can also withstand 220 degrees of high temperature, so you can use them in the oven with confidence.
Easy to Use: With our mini cupcake cases, even the new hands can bake cakes. And after baking, it is easy to take it out and eat without damaging the appearance of the cakes.

Attractive Appearance: We have a variety of different colours of cupcake cups for you to choose from, which are very suitable for various festivals and public places. The appearance of the paper shell makes it not easy to deform.

Wide Application: The cupcake baking cups will definitely make your cakes look better. You can use it in Christmas, wedding, birthday, anniversary, party and various celebrations. Make and share beautiful cupcakes with your friends quickly!

Standard Size: They are very basic cake cups and won’t be too large or too small. The diameter of the cup mouth is 6.8cm, the diameter of the cup bottom is 5cm, and the height is 4cm. There is no problem in daily use.
description: Product Description Why Choose Spesh Cupcake Cases? No need for cupcake baking tray The cupcake baking cups are sturdy enough to be placed directly in the oven without the need for baking pans. Note: Do not bake the empty cupcake liners in the oven! Safe and Healthy Food-Grade Materials Made from food-grade paper, oil-absorbent and grease-resistant. They can be safely used in microwaves, ovens, air fryers, and steamers. Great for DIY If you're looking to celebrate Halloween, Christmas, and other occasions, you can create DIY cupcakes for each event. Perfect for Making Gifts You can bake some delightful cupcakes as a birthday gift or for any special occasion, and your friends and family are sure to love them.
